description: Drudge Report from your terminal — with the editorial signal (splash, red, slot, tenure) the live page broadcasts but no other scraper preserves.

tools.name: feed_rss
tools.description: Fetch the unofficial RSS feed mirror. Items embed position labels (Main headline / First column / Second column) in CDATA and use the real outbound URL as the GUID. Pre-parsed by the CLI; most users will not call this directly. Returns the RawHTML.

tools.name: page_home
tools.description: Fetch the raw drudgereport.com HTML page. The CLI's parser turns this into ranked headlines with slot, is_red, image_url, and outbound_domain fields. Most users do not need to call this directly. Returns the RawHTML.
